name: kraft
title: Kraft
description: Composable AI tools for text, clipboard, selection, OCR, workflows, and conversation.
author: kilingzhang

commands.name: translate
commands.title: Kraft
commands.subtitle: AI Tools
commands.description: Open Kraft's AI tool menu powered by your configured API-compatible runtime.

commands.name: selected
commands.title: Ask Selected Text
commands.description: Run the default AI tool on selected text from the frontmost application.

commands.name: clipboard
commands.title: Ask Clipboard
commands.description: Run the default AI tool on clipboard text.

commands.name: ocr
commands.title: Ask Screenshot Text
commands.description: Capture text from an image region and run the default AI tool.

preferences.name: settingsLocation
preferences.title: Settings
preferences.description: Open Kraft and use App Settings, API Settings, and Tool Settings inside the extension.

scripts.build-swift: swift build --configuration=release --arch arm64 --arch x86_64 && mv .build/apple/Products/Release/{ocr,lang} assets
